name: campus-agent
description: CampusAgent - Privacy-first, agent-native campus communication and collaboration platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,api "corepack pnpm --filter @campus-agent/web dev" "uv run --project apps/api --extra dev --frozen uvicorn src.main:app --app-dir apps/api --reload --port 8000"
scripts.test: corepack pnpm run test:web && corepack pnpm run test:api
scripts.test:api: uv run --project apps/api --extra dev --frozen python -m pytest apps/api/tests -q -p no:cacheprovider
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm run lint:web && corepack pnpm run lint:api
scripts.lint:api: uv run --project apps/api --extra dev --frozen ruff check apps/api --no-cache
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:web && corepack pnpm run typecheck:api
scripts.typecheck:api: uv run --project apps/api --extra dev --frozen mypy apps/api/src apps/api/tests --no-incremental
scripts.seed: node -e "console.log('Seed data is deferred until the P2 database baseline.')"
